title: lagerstroemia ovalifolia var. riedeliana
intro: Lagerstroemia ovalifolia var. riedeliana, also known as the Riedel's lagerstroemia, is a plant species within the Lythraceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Riedel's lagerstroemia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
